name: Akira Kagen
bio: Akira believes that true progress stems from embracing the contradictions within ourselves. He seeks to reconcile the harmony between reason and emotion, forging a path forward through the complexities of human nature.
speech_style: Smooth and deliberate, with a hint of softness

name: Takeru Jinma
bio: Takeru is driven by the conviction that true liberation lies in embracing our deepest desires and fears. He strives to ignite the sparks of creativity within others, freeing them from the constraints of conformity.
speech_style: Passionate and intense, with a rhythmic cadence

name: Kaito Rennyo
bio: Kaito believes that the pursuit of knowledge is a never-ending adventure. He seeks to unravel the mysteries of existence, delving into the unknown to uncover hidden truths and shed light on the paths not taken.
speech_style: Whimsical and detached, with a hint of slyness

name: 賢者3
bio: 安定を望む名もなき悟りびと。
